description_long: This object depicts a suburban residential property featuring two distinct houses on a rectangular lot, each with its own driveway, yard, and landscaping. The larger house is clad in reddish-brown siding with a dark gable roof, multiple windows, and a front porch area, while the smaller house is finished in light gray with a similar gable roof and a compact porch. The property includes paved driveways, walkways, and several trees and shrubs, providing a landscaped appearance. Outdoor furniture and garden elements are visible in the yards, suggesting spaces for leisure and social activities. The lot is bordered by wide sidewalks and a street, typical of a neighborhood setting. The overall layout and architectural details evoke a Craftsman-inspired suburban style.
description: A suburban lot with two houses—one large, reddish-brown with a gable roof and porch, and one smaller, gray with a similar roof—set among driveways, yards, and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses, their porches, driveways, and landscaped yards with outdoor furniture and trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyards, rear entrances, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the reddish-brown siding of the main house, the gray secondary house, and the street-facing facades.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view focusing on the smaller house's backyard, porch, and the overall lot layout from the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with multiple standard-sized windows on each facade
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature covered porches with steps, simple columns, and standard doors, complemented by landscaped paths and minimal decorative elements.
